mapper.sql: 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count
mapper.select:
select occurred_at as bucket_start, cast(null as date) as activity_date, user_id, username, coalesce(organization, '未归属') as organization, coalesce(rd_department, '未归属') as rd_department, coalesce(department, '未归属') as department, coalesce(workspace_id, '__none__') as workspace_id, coalesce(agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(model_id, '__none__') as model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, occurred_at as first_activity_at, occurred_at as last_activity_at from ( select l.login_at as occurred_at, l.user_id as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, '__none__' as workspace_id, '__none__' as agent_id, '__none__' as model_id, 1 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from user_login_logs l join users u on u.user_id = l.user_id where l.login_result = 'SUCCESS' and l.login_at >= #{startInclusive} and l.login_at < #{endExclusive}
union all
select s.created_at as occurred_at, coalesce(s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, s.workspace_id, '__none__' as agent_id, '__none__' as model_id, 0 as login_count, 1 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, case when not exists (select 1 from session_messages m where m.session_id = s.session_id) and not exists (select 1 from runs r where r.session_id = s.session_id) then 1 else 0 end as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from sessions s left join users u on u.user_id = s.created_by_user_id where s.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and s.created_at < #{endExclusive}
union all
select max(x.occurred_at) as occurred_at, x.user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, x.workspace_id, '__none__' as agent_id, '__none__' as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 1 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, case when sum(x.user_message_hit) >= 2 then 1 else 0 end as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from ( select m.session_id, coalesce(m.sender_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, s.workspace_id, m.created_at as occurred_at, case when m.role = 'USER' then 1 else 0 end as user_message_hit from session_messages m join sessions s on s.session_id = m.session_id left join runs message_run on message_run.run_id = m.run_id where m.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and m.created_at < #{endExclusive} and m.role = 'USER' and ( coalesce(message_run.storage_mode, 'LEGACY_FULL') != 'REDIS_SUMMARY' or (message_run.storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY' and m.content_kind = 'SUMMARY') ) union all select r.session_id, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, r.workspace_id, r.created_at as occurred_at, 0 as user_message_hit from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id where r.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.created_at < #{endExclusive} ) x left join users u on u.user_id = x.user_id group by x.session_id, x.user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, x.workspace_id
union all
select m.created_at as occurred_at, coalesce(m.sender_user_id, r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, s.workspace_id, coalesce(m.agent_id, r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, case when m.role = 'USER' then 1 else 0 end as user_message_count, case when m.role = 'ASSISTANT' then 1 else 0 end as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from session_messages m join sessions s on s.session_id = m.session_id left join runs r on r.run_id = m.run_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(m.sender_user_id, r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where m.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and m.created_at < #{endExclusive} and m.role in ('USER', 'ASSISTANT') and ( coalesce(r.storage_mode, 'LEGACY_FULL') != 'REDIS_SUMMARY' or (r.storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY' and m.content_kind = 'SUMMARY') )
union all
select r.created_at as occurred_at, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, r.workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 1 as run_count, case when r.status = 'SUCCEEDED' then 1 else 0 end as succeeded_run_count, case when r.status = 'FAILED' then 1 else 0 end as failed_run_count, case when r.status = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end as cancelled_run_count, case when r.status = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end as active_termination_count, case when r.status in ('SUCCEEDED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') then 1 else 0 end as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, coalesce(r.tokens_input, 0) as tokens_input, coalesce(r.tokens_output, 0) as tokens_output, coalesce(r.tokens_reasoning, 0) as tokens_reasoning, coalesce(r.tokens_input, 0) + coalesce(r.tokens_output, 0) + coalesce(r.tokens_reasoning, 0) as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where r.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.created_at < #{endExclusive}
union all
select e.occurred_at as occurred_at, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, r.workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, case when e.type = 'diff.proposed' then 1 else 0 end as diff_proposed_count, case when e.type = 'diff.accepted' then 1 else 0 end as diff_accepted_count, case when e.type = 'diff.rejected' then 1 else 0 end as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from run_events e join runs r on r.run_id = e.run_id join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where e.occurred_at >= #{startInclusive} and e.occurred_at < #{endExclusive} and e.type in ('diff.proposed', 'diff.accepted', 'diff.rejected') and coalesce(r.storage_mode, 'LEGACY_FULL') != 'REDIS_SUMMARY'
union all
select r.updated_at as occurred_at, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, u.username, u.organization, u.rd_department, u.department, r.workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, 0 as positive_feedback_count, 0 as negative_feedback_count, coalesce(r.diff_proposed_count, 0) as diff_proposed_count, coalesce(r.diff_accepted_count, 0) as diff_accepted_count, coalesce(r.diff_rejected_count, 0) as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where r.storage_mode = 'REDIS_SUMMARY' and r.status in ('SUCCEEDED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') and r.updated_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.updated_at < #{endExclusive} and (coalesce(r.diff_proposed_count, 0) > 0 or coalesce(r.diff_accepted_count, 0) > 0 or coalesce(r.diff_rejected_count, 0) > 0)
union all
select f.created_at as occurred_at, f.user_id, u.username, coalesce(f.organization, u.organization) as organization, coalesce(f.rd_department, u.rd_department) as rd_department, coalesce(f.department, u.department) as department, s.workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, 0 as login_count, 0 as session_count, 0 as active_session_count, 0 as empty_session_count, 0 as continuous_session_count, 0 as user_message_count, 0 as assistant_message_count, 0 as run_count, 0 as succeeded_run_count, 0 as failed_run_count, 0 as cancelled_run_count, 0 as active_termination_count, 0 as valid_interaction_count, case when f.rating = 'POSITIVE' then 1 else 0 end as positive_feedback_count, case when f.rating = 'NEGATIVE' then 1 else 0 end as negative_feedback_count, 0 as diff_proposed_count, 0 as diff_accepted_count, 0 as diff_rejected_count, 0 as tokens_input, 0 as tokens_output, 0 as tokens_reasoning, 0 as tokens_total, 0 as duration_total_ms, 0 as duration_run_count from ai_message_feedbacks f join sessions s on s.session_id = f.session_id left join runs r on r.run_id = f.run_id left join users u on u.user_id = f.user_id where f.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and f.created_at < #{endExclusive} ) facts

select r.created_at as bucket_start, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, coalesce(u.username, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__')) as username, coalesce(u.organization, '未归属') as organization, coalesce(u.rd_department, '未归属') as rd_department, coalesce(u.department, '未归属') as department, coalesce(r.workspace_id, '__none__') as workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, r.created_at, r.updated_at from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where r.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.created_at < #{endExclusive} and r.status in ('SUCCEEDED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') and r.updated_at >= r.created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into analytics_user_activity_hourly( bucket_start, user_id, username, organization, rd_department, department, workspace_id, agent_id, model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, first_activity_at, last_activity_at, updated_at ) values
( #{row.bucketStart}, #{row.userId}, #{row.username}, #{row.organization}, #{row.rdDepartment}, #{row.department}, #{row.workspaceId}, #{row.agentId}, #{row.modelId}, #{row.loginCount}, #{row.sessionCount}, #{row.activeSessionCount}, #{row.emptySessionCount}, #{row.continuousSessionCount}, #{row.userMessageCount}, #{row.assistantMessageCount}, #{row.runCount}, #{row.succeededRunCount}, #{row.failedRunCount}, #{row.cancelledRunCount}, #{row.activeTerminationCount}, #{row.validInteractionCount}, #{row.positiveFeedbackCount}, #{row.negativeFeedbackCount}, #{row.diffProposedCount}, #{row.diffAcceptedCount}, #{row.diffRejectedCount}, #{row.tokensInput}, #{row.tokensOutput}, #{row.tokensReasoning}, #{row.tokensTotal}, #{row.durationTotalMs}, #{row.durationRunCount}, #{row.firstActivityAt}, #{row.lastActivityAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select bucket_start, cast(null as date) as activity_date, user_id, username, organization, rd_department, department, workspace_id, agent_id, model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, first_activity_at, last_activity_at from analytics_user_activity_hourly where bucket_start >= #{startInclusive} and bucket_start < #{endExclusive}
mapper.insert:
insert into analytics_user_activity_daily( activity_date, user_id, username, organization, rd_department, department, workspace_id, agent_id, model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, first_activity_at, last_activity_at, updated_at ) values
( #{row.activityDate}, #{row.userId}, #{row.username}, #{row.organization}, #{row.rdDepartment}, #{row.department}, #{row.workspaceId}, #{row.agentId}, #{row.modelId}, #{row.loginCount}, #{row.sessionCount}, #{row.activeSessionCount}, #{row.emptySessionCount}, #{row.continuousSessionCount}, #{row.userMessageCount}, #{row.assistantMessageCount}, #{row.runCount}, #{row.succeededRunCount}, #{row.failedRunCount}, #{row.cancelledRunCount}, #{row.activeTerminationCount}, #{row.validInteractionCount}, #{row.positiveFeedbackCount}, #{row.negativeFeedbackCount}, #{row.diffProposedCount}, #{row.diffAcceptedCount}, #{row.diffRejectedCount}, #{row.tokensInput}, #{row.tokensOutput}, #{row.tokensReasoning}, #{row.tokensTotal}, #{row.durationTotalMs}, #{row.durationRunCount}, #{row.firstActivityAt}, #{row.lastActivityAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update analytics_rollup_watermarks set watermark_at = #{watermarkAt}, generated_at = #{generatedAt}, status = #{status}, message = #{message}, trace_id = #{traceId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where job_name = #{jobName}
mapper.insert: insert into analytics_job_locks(lock_name, owner_id, locked_until, updated_at) values (#{lockName}, #{ownerId}, #{lockedUntil}, #{now})
mapper.select: select count(*) from users where status = 'ACTIVE'

select
coalesce(rd_department, '未归属')
coalesce(department, '未归属')
coalesce(organization, '未归属')
as name, count(*) as registered_users, sum(case when status = 'ACTIVE' then 1 else 0 end) as enabled_users from users where 1 = 1
group by
coalesce(rd_department, '未归属')
coalesce(department, '未归属')
coalesce(organization, '未归属')

select bucket_start, cast(null as date) as activity_date, user_id, username, organization, rd_department, department, workspace_id, agent_id, model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, first_activity_at, last_activity_at from analytics_user_activity_hourly where bucket_start >= #{startInclusive} and bucket_start < #{endExclusive}

select cast(null as timestamp) as bucket_start, activity_date, user_id, username, organization, rd_department, department, workspace_id, agent_id, model_id, login_count, session_count, active_session_count, empty_session_count, continuous_session_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count, run_count, succeeded_run_count, failed_run_count, cancelled_run_count, active_termination_count, valid_interaction_count, positive_feedback_count, negative_feedback_count, diff_proposed_count, diff_accepted_count, diff_rejected_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_reasoning, tokens_total, duration_total_ms, duration_run_count, first_activity_at, last_activity_at from analytics_user_activity_daily where activity_date >= #{startDate} and activity_date <= #{endDate}

select f.feedback_id, f.user_id, coalesce(u.username, f.user_id) as username, coalesce(f.organization, u.organization, '未归属') as organization, coalesce(f.rd_department, u.rd_department, '未归属') as rd_department, coalesce(f.department, u.department, '未归属') as department, f.session_id, f.run_id, f.message_id, f.rating, f.reason_code, f.comment, f.created_at, f.updated_at from ai_message_feedbacks f left join sessions s on s.session_id = f.session_id left join runs r on r.run_id = f.run_id left join users u on u.user_id = f.user_id where f.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and f.created_at < #{endExclusive}
order by f.created_at desc, f.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from ai_message_feedbacks f left join sessions s on s.session_id = f.session_id left join runs r on r.run_id = f.run_id left join users u on u.user_id = f.user_id where f.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and f.created_at < #{endExclusive}

select coalesce(f.reason_code, 'OTHER') as reason_code, count(*) as reason_count from ai_message_feedbacks f left join sessions s on s.session_id = f.session_id left join runs r on r.run_id = f.run_id left join users u on u.user_id = f.user_id where f.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and f.created_at < #{endExclusive} and f.rating = 'NEGATIVE'
group by coalesce(f.reason_code, 'OTHER') order by count(*) desc limit #{limit}

select r.run_id, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__') as user_id, coalesce(u.username, coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id, '__unknown__')) as username, coalesce(u.organization, '未归属') as organization, coalesce(u.rd_department, '未归属') as rd_department, coalesce(u.department, '未归属') as department, r.workspace_id, coalesce(r.agent_id, '__none__') as agent_id, coalesce(r.model_id, '__none__') as model_id, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where r.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.created_at < #{endExclusive} and r.status in ('FAILED', 'CANCELLED')
order by r.updated_at desc, r.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from runs r join sessions s on s.session_id = r.session_id left join users u on u.user_id = coalesce(r.triggered_by_user_id, s.created_by_user_id) where r.created_at >= #{startInclusive} and r.created_at < #{endExclusive} and r.status in ('FAILED', 'CANCELLED')
